headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' wss://paramant-relay.onrender.com https://paramant-relay.onrender.com wss: ws:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; worker-src blob:; manifest-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
